task_001.output:
Based on the search results, the top tourist attractions in Paris and Rome are:

**Paris:**
1. Eiffel Tower
2. Louvre
3. Notre Dame
4. Place des Vosges
5. Trevi Fountain (also in Rome, but mentioned in the Paris search results)
6. Colosseum (also in Rome, but mentioned in the Paris search results)
7. 7 more iconic sightseeing destinations (not specified in the search results)

**Rome:**
1. Colosseum
2. Trevi Fountain
3. Vatican
4. Sistine Chapel
5. 51 best attractions in Rome (not all specified in the search results)

args.query: top tourist attractions in Paris and Rome

tool_calls.result:
Search results for 'top tourist attractions in Paris and Rome':
1. Plan the best things to do in Paris and Rome with this detailed 7-day itinerary. Discover top attractions, daily plans, travel tips, and must-see landmarks.
2. These top 10 attractions include the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, Notre Dame, and 7 more iconic sightseeing destinations. Use our free guide to plan your Paris trip!
3. All the practical information, best attractions, great ideas, and the official Paris City Pass now available in a single app. Find your way around easily with the interactive map: museums, monuments, show venues, shops, restaurants ... discover the essential app to get the most out of your trip to Paris!
4. An overview of the top tourist attractions in Paris: 25. Place des Vosges The Place des Vosges, formerly called Place Royale, was the prototype for all residential squares in Europe. All houses were built using the same design: red brick with steep pitched blue slate roofs.
5. We've compiled a list of the 51 best attractions in Paris, from the big-name 'must-see' paris attractions to something a little bit more bespoke and treasured locally.

Search results for 'top tourist attractions in Rome':
1. When in Rome, visit Trevi Fountain and the Colosseum, but also take time to enjoy a cooking class and a local market or two. Discover the best things to do in Rome.
2. Discover the best things to do in Rome Italy, from the Colosseum and Trevi Fountain to the Vatican and Sistine Chapel. Find out how to book tickets, skip the lines and explore the historic landmarks and museums of the Eternal City.
3. Table of Contents Top 10 Things to Do in Rome This list starts with the very best things to do in Rome. These are the essential experiences to have, particularly if it is your first visit to Rome. 1. Colosseum Completed in 80 AD, this is the largest amphitheater that was ever built at the time.
4. Discover the top 10 must-visit places in Rome, from the Colosseum to the Vatican. Explore iconic landmarks, travel tips, and top-rated tours.
5. Take a look at the best attractions in Rome, from magnificent churches and ancient ruins to world-famous artworks.
